use_cases: Creates animated particle text for hero sections and creative displays
Forms text from scattered particles with smooth animation transitions
Adds visual impact to landing pages and marketing content
Generates decorative text effects for portfolios and creative sites
Provides customizable typography animation for branding
ai_summary: A particle text effect that renders any text string as animated particles, with configurable colors, animation duration, blur effects, and typography settings. Particles scatter and reform to spell out the specified text on a canvas.
